```{r create_table_os, results='asis', include=TRUE,echo=FALSE,message=FALSE}

# Tables for use of operating system by educational category ("Other" vs "Academic")
if ( nrow(data) >0 ) {

cat("\n**Operating System by Educational Category**\n\n")
os_filtered <- data |>
  filter(Finished == TRUE) |>
  mutate(
    EduCat = ifelse(Degree == "Other", "Other", "Academic")
  ) |>
  select(EduCat, starts_with("Desktop _"))

os_longer<- os_filtered |>
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Desktop _"), names_to = "OS", values_to = "Used") |>
  mutate(OS = recode(OS,
                    "Desktop _1" = "Windows",
                    "Desktop _2" = "Mac",
                    "Desktop _3" = "Linux")) |>
  filter(!is.na(Used)) 
  
# Calculate totals for each group
os_totals <- os_filtered |>
  group_by(EduCat) |>
  summarise(Total = n(), .groups = "drop")

overall_total <- nrow(os_filtered)

os_tab <- os_longer |>
  group_by(EduCat, OS) |>
  summarise(
    Frequency = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  left_join(os_totals, by = "EduCat") |>
  mutate(Percent = Frequency / Total * 100)

# Pivot wider for Academic/Other columns
os_wide <- os_tab |>
  select(OS, EduCat, Percent) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = EduCat,
    values_from = Percent,
    values_fill = 0
  )

# Ensure both Academic and Other columns exist
if (!"Academic" %in% names(os_wide)) os_wide$Academic <- 0
if (!"Other" %in% names(os_wide)) os_wide$Other <- 0

# Calculate overall percentages
overall_tab <- os_longer |>
  group_by(OS) |>
  summarise(Frequency = n(), .groups = "drop")|>
  mutate(Overall = Frequency / overall_total * 100) |>
  select(OS, Overall)

# Merge overall into wide table
final_tab <- os_wide |>
  left_join(overall_tab, by = "OS") |>
  select(OS, Academic, Other, Overall) |>
  mutate(
    Academic = sprintf("%.1f%%", Academic),
    Other = sprintf("%.1f%%", Other),
    Overall = sprintf("%.1f%%", Overall)
  )

final_tab |>
  kable() |>
  footnote(general = "Completed responses only. Multiple mentions possible. Cells show percent of OS mentions by group. ")
}
```
